title: MAJORITY Scholars SCH-DVD-BLK UK DVD Player

description.main: Enjoy rewatching your favourite classic films with this Majority DVD player. It's multi-regional, so you can play DVDs from anywhere in the world. If you fancy a bit of music, it works as a CD player too. And the USB port lets you plug in a flash drive – perfect for viewing holiday photos and videos on your TV screen.
goodToKnow: The remote control means you can play and pause from the comfort of your chair
It's easy to set up – just plug it into your TV with the included RCA cable
With the HDMI port you can connect it to newer TVs too (cable sold separately)
